name: Vikram Chopra
tagline: Essays on pressure, judgment, ambition, and company building.
description: A home for essays and notes on building companies, making hard decisions, and staying steady under pressure.
intro: I write about building companies, making decisions under pressure, and staying clear-eyed while the stakes rise.
about: The work that matters most to me lives in the tension between intensity and steadiness: how to move fast without becoming frantic, and how to demand more without losing care for the people around the work.
footerNote: Built for long arguments, sharp ideas, and posts worth rereading.

interviews.title: He Built India's Biggest Car Selling & Purchasing Platform
interviews.description: A wide-ranging conversation on building Cars24, leadership, hiring, scaling, and lessons learned from Mahendra Singh Dhoni.

interviews.title: Meet Cars24 Founder
interviews.description: A conversation on the early journey behind Cars24, ambition, and the mindset required to build through uncertainty.

interviews.title: How Cars24 CEO, Vikram Chopra Built a Rs 27,000 cr used car startup
interviews.description: A detailed conversation on growing Cars24, the used-car market, early company building, and the journey from Raebareli to scaling a large business.

interviews.title: Playing the long game: what it takes to build generation defining companies
interviews.description: A panel on building enduring companies, with Vikram Chopra alongside Asish Mohapatra and Varun Alagh.

elsewhere.title: What You're Actually Paying For When You Buy a Used Car Online
elsewhere.description: A detailed argument about pricing, trust, and what buyers are really comparing when they evaluate used-car platforms against local dealers.

elsewhere.title: The world is in a bad place this year, but I need to take a long-term view
elsewhere.description: A conversation on navigating a funding winter, reducing burn, and making decisions with a multi-decade view of the business.

elsewhere.title: 'Political Will' Is India’s Biggest Failure in Air Pollution Control
elsewhere.description: An argument for uncomfortable public-policy action on pollution, even when that stance cuts against the immediate interests of the car industry.

elsewhere.title: Rising Strong: The Art of Failing Forward
elsewhere.description: A short reflection on failure, resilience, and the emotional work required to keep moving after setbacks.

elsewhere.title: Embracing Discomfort for Growth
elsewhere.description: A note on choosing discomfort deliberately as a condition for growth, ambition, and better judgment.
